brief: Welcome post for VOIDBORN dark fantasy online TCG. Hook headline: "Born of the Void". Realm atmosphere: The Cloud Sanctuary (anemos). Introduce four elemental realms, deck building, tactical battles, ranked play. Free to start at https://voidborn.fun. Instagram punchy + hashtags; Facebook longer story; Discord markdown feature list + play link.

image.prompt: Cinematic 1:1 shot of a massive, ancient stone golem standing in a ruined, moss-covered granite courtyard, mountain fortress architecture, crumbling stone pillars, floating golden amber light particles, dark fantasy atmosphere, misty background with shadowy void corruption, highly detailed, photorealistic, 8k resolution.
